title: End Control
description: Adds commands to lock your end to prevent griefers
body: The End Locker Addon gives server owners full control over End access with simple commands. Lock or unlock the End instantly using /endlock and /endunlock, preventing players from entering until you’re ready for the challenge. When locked, the addon blocks all portal access, stopping early Ender Dragon fights and progression skips. Unlock the End at the right moment to enable coordinated Ender Dragon battles, planned events, or timed progression for your players. Perfect for survival worlds, multiplayer servers, and custom maps, The End Locker Addon ensures fair, structured gameplay while giving administrators easy, reliable control over when and how the End becomes accessible.
